footer.tagline: Your Local Expert for Vietnam Tours.
footer.helpTitle: If You Have Any Questions, Let Us Help You!
footer.trustLine: Local guides · Curated itineraries · Trusted by inbound travellers

consent.message: We use cookies only when you opt in — for site analytics and improving tour recommendations. No tracking happens before you choose.

home.heroTitle: Explore Vietnam With A Local Tour Operator
home.heroSubtitle: Private tours, cruises, car transfers, and custom proposals across Vietnam. Designed by local specialists, backed by real human support.
home.whoWeAreTitle: A Vietnam travel agency built around local knowledge.
home.whoWeAreBody: TC Travel Vietnam designs private tours, small-group experiences, car transfers, cruises, and custom proposals with direct support from local specialists.
home.featuredToursSubtitle: Our team of local travel experts has curated unique experiences and tours at competitive prices.
home.cruisesSubtitle: Choose from featured cruise itineraries and river journeys, then ask our local team to shape details around your budget and travel style.
home.destinationsSubtitle: Discover popular destinations in Vietnam with local tours, food, culture, beaches, and daily-life experiences.
home.blogSubtitle: Get expert advice, destination inspiration, and the best travel tips.
home.whyItem1Body: Guides and trip planners based in Central Vietnam.
home.whyItem2Body: Real WhatsApp follow-up before every departure.
home.whyItem3Body: Confirm details first, then pay when plans are clear.
home.whyItem4Body: Private routes and small groups shaped around local life.

experiences.title: Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Show tickets, spa sessions, basket-boat rides, and local add-ons — book alongside your tour.
experiences.metaDescription: Book show tickets (Ky Uc Hoi An), massage & spa, basket boat rides, and more local experiences in Central Vietnam.
experiences.empty: New experiences are being added — check back soon.
experiences.payLaterNote: No payment now — our team confirms availability and final price first.

voucher.title: Have a voucher code?
voucher.valid: {discount} applied with "{name}" — quote this code when booking!

invalid.not-found: We couldn't find this code. Please check the spelling.
invalid.used: This voucher has already been used.
invalid.not-applicable: This voucher doesn't apply to this product.

hub.faqTitle: How to decide what to do in {destination}

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.empty: Guest reviews are shared after each confirmed trip.
reviews.commentPlaceholder: How was your trip? What should other travellers know?
reviews.moderationNote: Reviews are checked by our team before they appear — usually within 24 hours.
reviews.pendingNote: It will appear here once our team approves it — usually within 24 hours.

giveaway.disclaimer: By signing up you agree to receive our travel deals newsletter. Unsubscribe anytime.
giveaway.successBody: Check your inbox — the best Central Vietnam deals are on their way.
giveaway.defaultTitle: Be the first to hear about new travel deals!
giveaway.defaultDescription: Join our newsletter for member-only offers on tours, cruises, and transfers across Central Vietnam.

policy.title: Cancellation Policy
policy.subtitle: Clear, traveller-friendly terms — most plans can change without fees when you tell us early.
policy.metaDescription: TC Travel Vietnam cancellation policy: flexible changes, clear refund terms, and pay-later bookings for tours, cruises, and transfers.
policy.fallbackIntro: Every booking starts as a free inquiry — no payment is taken until a team member confirms your plan. For confirmed bookings, tell us as early as possible about changes; most tours and transfers can be rescheduled or cancelled without fees up to 24 hours before the start time.
policy.fallbackContact: For cruises and third-party tickets, partner terms may apply — we always state them before you confirm. Questions? Reach us on WhatsApp or email and we'll sort it out.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Booking, payment, pickup, weather — the answers travellers ask us most.
faqPage.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about booking tours, transfers, payment, cancellation, and travel in Hoi An, Hue, and Da Nang.
faqPage.empty: We're writing this page right now — meanwhile, message us on WhatsApp with any question and a real person will answer.

tours.heroSubtitle: Private, small group, partner, and free tours across Central Vietnam. Curated by local guides.
tours.found: {count, plural, one {# tour found} other {# tours found}}
